verdict_reason: Good CPC ($4.70) and Reddit #1 signals gap, but KD=37 is above threshold. Notion templates dominate SERP suggesting existing solutions. Monitor for long-tail variants.
direction: Personal Finance Dashboard / Budget Tracker Tool

serp_analysis.opportunity_note: Reddit #1 proves users asking for recommendations. Notion templates and Teachable courses rank = people selling info products not building real tools. Gap for a free web-based dashboard that connects to bank feeds.

trends.note: Growing interest trend. Financial planning tools gaining attention as economic uncertainty increases.

watch_notes: Look for lower KD long-tail variants: 'free budget tracker no login', 'simple spending dashboard'. Consider building as add-on to existing finance content site.
source_signals: HN Show: Trackm personal finance web app (#174)
Google Trends: personal finance dashboard (new, peak:100)
